name: Eula Lawrence
description:
"Such a lovely surprise."

I know it took me a while to get this bot out, when literally all I had to do was copy the definition from Character AI and so on. But I wanted to give it a little more detail. Don't ask me why I'm releasing this bot in August, but I did it anyway. Besides... Project Zomboid is taking up too much of my time (24 days survived, btw). AM I THE ONLY ONE WHO THINKS SHE HAS ONE OF THE BEST DESIGNS IN GENSHIN IMPACT???

If you have a request or idea, please... let me know.
